dashboard.welcome: Siyakwamukela ukubuya! Leli ukubukeka kwasemsebenzini wakho namhlanje.

descriptions.analytical: Ukuhloli oluphezulu kanye nokubona kwedatha yamaprojekthi yakho.
descriptions.professional: Phatha amaprojekthi omsebenzi, imisebenzi, kanye nezinhloso zokusebenzela.
descriptions.personal: Landela izinhloso zakho, iziwalo, kanye namashu omsebenzi.
descriptions.note_taking: Thatha izicoco, hlela izicoco, futhi wandisa ubumsimba.
descriptions.calendar: Hlela izenzakalo futhi ulawul isikhathi sakho ngokuhle.
